{{Quote|Oh yeah, one Lady Lapema Phonstom on Kabal. And so on down the list. But I'm not going to worry about ''them'' until I've dealt with the first three names.|Lando Calrissian|<ref name="Ambush at Corellia" />}}
Lady '''Lapema Phonstom''' was a wealthy, eligible [[Gender/Legends|woman]] living on [[Kabal/Legends|Kabal]] during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. She was one of the top five candidates chosen by [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] to [[Marriage/Legends|marry]].<ref name="Ambush at Corellia" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Ambush at Corellia]]'' {{1stm}}
